title: Cloudflare Workers & Edge Computing
subtitle: Serverless at the edge — Workers, KV, R2, D1, Durable Objects, and the new shape of infrastructure.
summary: Cloudflare Workers run JavaScript at 300+ edge locations globally — milliseconds from any user. Combined with Cloudflare's storage primitives (KV, R2, D1, Durable Objects), they enable a new architecture: serverless apps with no cold starts, global state, and a programming model that fits modern teams. This course covers building, deploying, and operating Workers in production.
